name: nolan-young-theme-template-01
description: Development tooling for the Nolan Young WordPress 7.0 classic theme with theme.json.

scripts.dev: npm run clean && npm run lint && node build/dev.js
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run lint && npm run build:assets && npm run validate
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run validate
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:node && npm run lint:css
scripts.lint:node: node --check build/clean.js && node --check build/dev.js && node --check build/package-theme.js && node --check build/validate.js
